response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms and has no evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain expertise, which are mandatory for this role; his career is dominated by web, mobile, and open-source projects in JavaScript, TypeScript, DLang, and Node.js, with only a brief early-career C++ mention in LabWindows™/CVI unrelated to financial systems.
strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience across diverse technologies
Strong track record in open-source contributions and developer tooling
Proven ability in CI/CD, testing practices, and system design
concerns: No verified C++ development on Windows in last 20+ years
No exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or banking domain systems
SQL experience listed but not contextualized in financial data systems
